query2.sqlString:
SELECT [o].[OrderID], [o].[CustomerID], [c].[CustomerID], [c].[AccountOpenedDate], [c].[CreditLimit], [c].[CustomerName]
FROM [Sales].[Orders] AS [o]
INNER JOIN [Sales].[Customers] AS [c] ON [o].[CustomerID] = [c].[CustomerID]
WHERE [o].[CustomerID] = 1
ORDER BY [o].[OrderID], [c].[CustomerID]

This LINQ query is being executed in split-query mode, and the SQL shown is for the first query to be executed. Additional queries may also be executed depending on the results of the first query.

query3.sqlString:
SELECT [o].[TaxRate], COUNT(*) AS [Count]
FROM [Sales].[OrderLines] AS [o]
GROUP BY [o].[TaxRate]
ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC

firstSample.description: Black and orange fragile despatch tape 48mmx75m

lastSample.description: Black and orange fragile despatch tape 48mmx100m

query4.sqlString:
DECLARE @p int = 50;

SELECT TOP(@p) [o].[OrderLineID], [o].[Description], [o].[LastEditedBy], [o].[LastEditedWhen], [o].[OrderID], [o].[PackageTypeID], [o].[PickedQuantity], [o].[PickingCompletedWhen], [o].[Quantity], [o].[StockItemID], [o].[TaxRate], [o].[UnitPrice]
FROM [Sales].[OrderLines] AS [o]
ORDER BY [o].[Quantity] DESC
